field.slugConfirmLabel: Type the universe slug to confirm

message.generalSubtitle: Edit the universe's name, slug, description, and cover image.
message.contentLocaleHint: Language used in story prose, character descriptions, codex bodies. Switching doesn't migrate existing content.
message.uidAlreadyOwner: That UID is already the owner.
message.uidAlreadyContributor: That UID is already a contributor.
message.removeContributorConfirm: Remove contributor "{{ uid }}" from this universe?
message.uidHint: Ask the user to copy their UID from the auth menu and paste it here.
message.dangerSubtitle: Permanently delete this universe. Everything inside — stories, characters, places, events, codex, media — is removed. This cannot be undone.
message.deleteConfirmPrompt: This will permanently delete {{ name }} and everything inside. Type the universe slug to confirm.
message.deleteSlugMismatch: Slug doesn't match. Type it exactly.
message.cleanupPendingSubtitle: These universes were soft-deleted but cleanup didn't finish. Resume to delete the remaining data.
message.cleanupRunning: Cleaning up — {{ processed }} of {{ total }} ({{ step }})
